approach: behavior-preserving refactor (TDD: tests-first red → implement → green)
summary: Removed the state.terminal.* reducer slice and migrated the Mobile terminal tab to useTerminalPanePolling (the same hook PC split panes use, #728). prompt / isSelectionListActive / Auto-Yes remained parent-driven (out of state.terminal scope).

source: src/types/ui-state.ts — removed TerminalState interface, WorktreeUIState.terminal, initialTerminalState, createInitialUIState terminal init
src/types/ui-actions.ts — removed SET_TERMINAL_OUTPUT/ACTIVE/THINKING/SET_AUTO_SCROLL + unused compound actions START_WAITING_FOR_RESPONSE/RESPONSE_RECEIVED/SESSION_ENDED + unused CLIToolType import
src/hooks/useWorktreeUIState.ts — removed corresponding reducer cases, action creators, WorktreeUIActions members, initialTerminalState + CLIToolType imports, updated JSDoc example
src/components/worktree/WorktreeDetailSubComponents.tsx — added MobileTerminalTab (useTerminalPanePolling, mounted only on terminal tab), replaced MobileContent terminal display props with cliToolId

src/components/worktree/WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx — MobileContent call uses cliToolId; MessageInput isSessionRunning + polling cadence gate derive from worktree.sessionStatusByCli[activeCliTab].isRunning; fetchCurrentOutput terminal writes removed (prompt/selection/auto-yes kept); worktreeId reset / CLI-tab effect / handleKillConfirm terminal resets removed; unused handleAutoScrollChange removed; stale comments updated
tests: tests/unit/hooks/useWorktreeUIState.test.ts — removed Terminal-actions + Compound-actions describe blocks and removed-action-creator assertions; added 'terminal slice removed' regression describe (slice undefined, legacy actions no-op) + 'does not expose removed action creators' test

tests/unit/components/worktree/WorktreeDetailRefactored-cli-tab-switching.test.tsx — R3-010 complete rewrite: mocks useTerminalPanePolling (vi.hoisted), verifies CLI switch re-keys the hook (poller restart) + renders active CLI output; kept the parent-level message stale-guard test
docs: CLAUDE.md — module reference updates for WorktreeDetailRefactored / WorktreeDetailSubComponents / useWorktreeUIState / ui-state.ts

test_count_delta.cli-tab-switching.test.tsx: 2 → 2 (rewritten: 1 kept message stale-guard, 1 new hook re-key test)

quality_gates.grep_state_terminal_code: 0 code references (only an intentional regression assertion `expect(state.terminal).toBeUndefined()` + unrelated #728 terminalSplits remain)

design_decisions: useTerminalPanePolling real signature is { worktreeId, cliToolId, enabled? } — no splitIndex (issue pseudocode was wrong); MobileTerminalTab uses { worktreeId, cliToolId }.
prompt / isSelectionListActive / Auto-Yes are NOT part of state.terminal (separate slices/useState driven by fetchCurrentOutput), so they were left parent-driven — minimal, in-scope change.
MobileTerminalTab mounts only while the terminal tab is active, so the poller stops on other tabs and there is no PC double-poll (hook is mobile-subtree-only).
Compound actions were verified unused in production before deletion.
